title: pandanus novohibernicus var. novohibernicus
intro: Pandanus novohibernicus var. novohibernicus, also known as the New Guinea screwpine, is a species of plant native to the tropical regions of New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the New Guinea screwpine include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
